steps: Pick islets into 35mm non-tissue cultured coated (NTCC) dish and ‘wash’ islets with 2 mL of KRBH with low glucose (2.8mM).
Pick islets into new 35mm NTCC dish in 2 mL of low glucose KRBH and pre-incubate in incubator at 37 °C 5 % CO 2 for 01:00:00 .
Transfer islets into a new 35mm NTCC dish and add 2 mL of low glucose (2.8mM) KRBH and pre-incubate for 01:00:00 at 37 °C , 5 % CO 2 .

Pick 15 islets into eppendorf tubes. Each treatment group should be done in triplicate. Control group is typically 2.8mM glucose for low glucose and 16.7mM glucose for high glucose Number of islets can be increased/decreased depending on ELISA kit sensitivity
Gently add 500 µL of low glucose KRBH to the islets, and incubate for 01:00:00 at 37 °C , 5 % CO 2 . Leave tube lids open.
Close lids, gently invert tubes, and centrifuge at 1000 rpm, °C, 1 minute to pellet islets.
Collect as much of the 500 µL supernatant as possible without disturbing the pellet. Store supernatant at -20 °C until insulin assay.
Gently add 500 µL of high glucose (16.7mM) KRBH to islets, and incubate for 01:00:00 with conditions at 37 °C , 5 % CO 2 . Leave lids open.
Close lids, gently invert tubes, and centrifuge at 1000 rpm, °C, 1 minute to pellet islets.
Collect as much of the 500 µL supernatant as possible without disturbing the pellet. Store supernatant at -20 °C until insulin assay. Undetermined
Add 500 µL of acid ethanol to the islets. Store tube at -20 °C until insulin assay.

Prepare solutions as follows: A B C 1   mM Final per 100mL total 2 NaCl 115 5.75mL (2M) 3 KCl 5 0.5mL (1M) 4 NaHCO3 24 0.2g 5 CaCl2 2.5 0.25mL (1M) 6 MgCl2 1 0.1mL (1M) 7 HEPES 10 1mL (1M) 8 BSA 0.1% w/v 0.1g KRBH is made fresh on the day of the experiment Mix chemicals from above table in milliQ water (approximately 80 mL ). Warm KRBH solution to 37 °C in incubator 37°C, 5% CO 2 (Approximately 30 min). Once solution is warmed, pH KRBH solution to pH 7.4 with NaOH and bring to volume ( 100 mL ). KRBH Solution should be kept in incubator throughout the experiment. Add glucose and/or additional treatments as required. A B C 1 per 50mL total from 1M stock from powder 2 2.8mM 140µL 0.025g 3 16.7mM 835µL 0.150g 1M glucose stock should be made fresh on day of experiment Acid Ethano l: A B 1 95% Ethanol 150mL 2 Acetic Acid 47mL 3 Concentrated HCL 3mL This solution can be made in advance
Pick mouse islets into Mouse Islet Culture Media until as close as possible to 100% purity. Mouse Islet Culture Media %s %s
Culture islets overnight in incubator at 37°C, 5% CO 2 .
Samples are assayed using ALPCO Stellux Rodent Insulin ELISA kit (Cat # 80-INSMR-CH10). Content samples are diluted with zero buffer 1:400.
Mouse islets isolated as described in Mouse Islet Isolation protocol.
creator: Aliya F Spigelman
